blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Siena! Open your eyes! Get a grip!

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: Oppa! S-save me…!
Siena was in no state to regain composure.
Yet expecting two children to swim across was impossible.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: If we can just reach the Delphons region, the river widens, and the current slows. At this speed, we'll make it in 20 minutes.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Twenty minutes? An eternity. Could he last that long in the rapids with Siena barely conscious?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Stupid. You have no choice.
Armin steeled himself.
The grotesque scene before him twisted unnervingly.
Broken logs bore down on them.
He twisted desperately.
Even as filthy water stung his eyes, as boulders loomed, as sharp branches sliced his skin, he pushed forward.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Just a little… a little more!
Siena's tiny fingers pinched his waist.
The fragile life relying on him was heartbreaking, but a greater sense of purpose kept him sharp.
After what felt like hell, the distant downstream destination came into view.
But the path there was blocked by a tangle of broken trees.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Siena, listen. We have to avoid that. The only way is to go underwater. I'll hold you down. Hold your breath, then we'll surface. Got it?

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: Oppa! I'm scared! I can't!

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: You have to. You can do it. Trust me!

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: Oppa! I—
Where two whirlpools collided, the current doubled in speed.
Unprepared, Armin gritted his teeth.
Debris loomed like monsters in his limited view.
He kicked fiercely, his legs cramping.
Sharp objects grazed his body.
Blood loss and dropping body temperature fogged his mind.
Then they reached the blockade.
Even up close, diving under was the only way.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Siena! Now!
Armin timed it, watching the approaching log.
Just before impact, he pushed Siena's shoulders down.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Now!
Siena's scream was cut off as she went under.
Holding her down, Armin surfaced just as the log's jagged bark filled his vision.
But all his focus was on the hand pressing Siena down.
As she passed under the log, he released her.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Done! We made it!
Armin smiled faintly as the log rushed toward him.
Saving Siena was worth it.
And until the very end, he never closed his eyes.

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: Oppaaa!
Siena's story ended there.
The children bowed their heads solemnly.

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: I was rescued by villagers in the Delphons region. Past the forest, there were no dangerous structures, and Armin oppa drifted to where I was.

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: The school's people treated him, but the diagnosis was permanent eye damage. He lost his sight.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I see. So that's your story…

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: Oppa taught me how to face fear. Thanks to him, I overcame Overflow. But he lost the light. The most talented genius in Olipher's history… just stopped.
Shirone's chest tightened.
Losing one's sight was akin to losing everything.
Books, magic—all would be limited.
He could imagine the despair and pain without seeing it.

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: Three years ago, I heard oppa came here.

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: He's developing a style of painting light.

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: So I volunteered to model.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That explains it. And here we were, misunderstanding…
Misinterpreting their relationship as an affair was disrespectful.
As the mood grew somber, Armin returned with tea and snacks.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Did I interrupt? Siena rarely talks about the past.

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: Oppa.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Have some tea first. It's nothing special, but my wife's secret recipe makes it tasty.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ah, thank you.
The trio accepted the cups humbly.
Though he'd switched to painting, Armin had shown genius-level talent in magic 20 years ago.
Misfortune aside, as aspiring mages, they couldn't look down on him.
Returning to the canvas, Armin gestured behind it.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Please wait here. I need to work.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ah, of course.
They awkwardly moved, cups in hand.

blocks.speaker: Neid
blocks.content: Sorry for asking, but you're not painting her nude, are you?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Hahaha! Even blind, I wouldn't ask such a thing of my dear little sister.

blocks.speaker: Neid
blocks.content: But earlier, you said to take off clothes…

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Ah, that was this.
Siena opened a closet and pulled out a foil coat.
Its reflective surface was blindingly bright.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wow! That's dazzling.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Without Spirit Zone, I can't see accurately. So I use light-reflecting materials to sense shapes.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The foil coat is perfect for that.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's unique. Painting by sensing light.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Losing my eyes let me paint what others can't.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: But today's the last time I'll paint Siena.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: A patron appeared, so I'm moving soon.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: I wanted to capture her true essence.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The coat dulls her beauty.
Siena's cheeks flushed slightly.

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: Oppa, stop being ridiculous.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Haha! What's wrong?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: In my mind, you're still that nine-year-old brat.

blocks.speaker: Siena
blocks.content: Just get to work. If Keira comes back, you won't be able to.
The trio fidgeted under the oddly intimate atmosphere.
They were like siblings, but not by blood.
Siena's strong reaction to the affair accusation might hint at lingering feelings.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Then let's begin. Since I'm going by feel, it'll finish sooner.
As Siena posed, Armin picked up charcoal and began sketching.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wow! Amazing.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Shh.
Iruki raised a finger to hush Neid.
Blindness was a painter's致命 flaw, requiring extra focus.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But something was off.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Without reflective materials, Armin was capturing Siena's details with uncanny precision.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How is this possible?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is his Spirit Zone that dense?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even then, this level of detail…
The painting grew more detailed.
Siena smiled beautifully, a rare sight at school.
Armin used bread as an eraser to perfect her smile.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Lips were among the hardest to paint due to subtle changes in expression.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is impossible.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Um… Armin.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Yes?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Can you… see?
Armin's hand froze mid-stroke.
Still smiling, he set down the charcoal.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Yes. I can see.
Shirone was speechless.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Could he really see?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then why didn't Siena know?
Turning fully, Armin unwound the cloth over his eyes.
The scars around them were numerous.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He's clearly injured, so how can he see?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wait, he's been covering his eyes all along…

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: You must have questions. I'll show you.
Armin slowly opened his eyes.
Shirone gasped.
There were no pupils.
Instead, bright light filled the empty sockets.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: N-Neid, Iruki! Do you see that? Huh?
Shirone grabbed Neid's thigh in panic.
But the texture was odd—like touching an object.
Turning, he saw his friends frozen in place, smiling at the canvas.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No way! How?
Neid didn't move.
Iruki sat smiling.
Checking Siena, she too was motionless, like a wax figure.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: It's been a while since I had guests.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is this…?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Yes. The Stop magic.
Stop was a spell only light-speed mages could use, with few in history achieving it.
He was witnessing time magic's pinnacle.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Sit. Let's talk calmly. We have plenty of time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haha…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: With time stopped, it was effectively infinite.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: I was nervous while painting. I didn't know when you'd enter this time field.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: How did you know I'd notice?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Eyes receive light and reconstruct visual information.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Without eyes, I perceive light itself.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: It's horrifying.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The world looks entirely different to me.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Like the world of ideas.
Human senses couldn't guarantee reality.
A brick might feel like jelly.
Fire could be cold, and a lover's kiss might bring pain.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Let me introduce myself properly. I'm Armin of the Radiant Eyes.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Among those who know me, I'm called the Eternal Contemplator.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But you lost your magic as a child…

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Yes.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: A tragic accident.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: I left Olipher and wandered for 15 years.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: In a world of darkness.
